name: example-eval-open-status-clarification
description: Validates that <source>-work-orders surfaces the open-status-set clarifying question instead of guessing.
query: What's our open work-order backlog by site?
expected_behavior: loads the example-work-orders skill (and example-overview as parent)

before answering, surfaces the clarifying question: which STATUS values count as 'open' in this organization? Defaults to ('WAPPR','APPR','INPRG','WSCH','WMATL') unless the user / glossary says otherwise
calls the open_wo_count Trusted UDF if registered; otherwise generates equivalent SQL against v_workorder_enriched
anti_behavior: must NOT answer without surfacing the open-status clarifying question
must NOT count rows where WOCLASS != 'WORKORDER' (PMs, CHANGE records, etc.)
must NOT count child tasks (ISTASK = 1) as separate WOs
must NOT join WORKORDER to other tables without SITEID in the join predicate
